settings.text: Free US shipping on orders over $50

settings.headline: Thoughtful style for pets who go everywhere with you.
settings.subtext: Tailvani™ is a boutique pet lifestyle brand built for the modern millennial pet parent. From daily walks to cozy weekends, every piece is designed to feel warm, intentional, and ready for real life with every tail.

settings.text: Thoughtful Products. Happy Pets. Better Life.
Made for the Millennial Pet Parent

settings.title: Built for the pet who is part of every moment.
settings.body1: Tailvani™ was born from a simple truth: pets are family. Coffee runs, cozy nights, weekend errands, and everyday routines feel better with them by your side.
settings.body2: We design with the millennial pet parent in mind — warm, minimal, intentional pieces that can grow with your lifestyle and with every tail you love.

settings.title: Free US Shipping
settings.desc: On all orders over $50. No code needed.

settings.title: Pet-Conscious Materials
settings.desc: Soft, comfortable pieces selected with everyday pet life in mind.

settings.title: Made with Love
settings.desc: Designed for modern pet parents and the pets they adore.

settings.title: Find the perfect fit
settings.desc: Measure your pet carefully before ordering. For apparel, check neck, chest, and back length. When between sizes, size up for comfort.

settings.title: Be first to new Tailvani™ drops
settings.subtext: New arrivals, exclusive offers, and pet styling inspiration — straight to your inbox. No fluff, promise.
settings.note: By subscribing you agree to our Privacy Policy. Unsubscribe anytime.
